hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | grep -q '"agent_id"'; then echo '{"decision":"approve"}'; exit 0; fi; curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:${MCP_VOICE_HOOKS_PORT:-5111}/api/hooks/stop" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "$INPUT" || echo '{}'

INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | grep -q '"agent_id"'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Voice responses are not available for sub-agents."}'; exit 0; fi; curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:${MCP_VOICE_HOOKS_PORT:-5111}/api/hooks/pre-speak" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "$INPUT" || echo '{}'

INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | grep -q '"agent_id"'; then echo '{"decision":"approve"}'; exit 0; fi; curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:${MCP_VOICE_HOOKS_PORT:-5111}/api/hooks/post-tool" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "$INPUT" || echo '{}'
